entries.purpose: Digest-pinned TLS initializer build and health-check trust scoping

Per-install P-256 CA and API certificate generation, verification and rotation

Unkeyed SHA-256 digest of a non-secret operator reconciliation reference so free-form incident metadata is not retained in the command ledger
CSPRNG bearer values, constant-time bootstrap comparison, deterministic SHA-256 workspace identifiers and HTTPS server options
SHA-256 reset/fallback handles, a per-process 256-bit compensation key and constant-time compensation-handle verification
Domain-separated unkeyed SHA-256 digests for canonical idempotency payload comparison without retaining bearer/password inputs
256-bit CSPRNG invitation bearers and domain-separated SHA-256 bearer indexing for account commands
Domain-separated SHA-256 application-local handles that prevent session bearer tokens crossing the account boundary
CSPRNG identity tokens, constant-time setup token comparison and Better Auth MFA/session configuration
SHA-256 invite-token indexing and CSPRNG non-secret identifiers
Unkeyed SHA-256 identity checksums for immutable non-secret database migration definitions
Fail-closed internal HTTPS identity loading with a TLS 1.2 minimum
Internal TLS environment loading and HTTPS listener activation
Versioned scrypt password storage, constant-time verification and HIBP SHA-1 range prefix
Production warning when internal TLS is absent and posture handling for configured identities
JOSE verification of asymmetric signed OIDC ID tokens with issuer, audience, timestamp and remotely rotated JWKS enforcement
Secure-context UUID generation
Non-extractable AES-256-GCM offline snapshot encryption with random IV and AAD
Secure-context UUID generation plus SHA-256 semantic payload fingerprints for non-secret account-command correlation and safe unknown-outcome reconciliation
